response: THE TOTAL AREA COVERED BY ALL 8 CIRCLES IS πr² + π(1.1r)² + π(1.21r)² + π(1.331r)² + π(1.4641r)² + π(1.61051r)² + π(1.771561r)² + π(1.9487171r)². THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS THAT CAN BE PLACED ALONG THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE 5TH CIRCLE IS 110. THE LETTER I APPEARS 11 TIMES IN THIS RESPONSE.
